steps.title: Add the equations
steps.content: The system is $$(x-3)-5(y+6)=128$$ $$(x-3)+5(y+6)=467.$$ Add the equations so the $-5(y+6)$ and $+5(y+6)$ terms cancel.

steps.title: Target the requested expression
steps.content: Adding gives $$2(x-3)=128+467=595.$$ The question asks for $6(x-3)$, which is $3$ times $2(x-3)$.

steps.title: Confirm the shortcut
steps.content: There is no need to find $x$ or $y$ separately. The elimination step gives the requested expression directly, so the answer is 1785.
